title: U20 青年气候行动峰会
description: U20 峰会旨在进行一场能力基建实验，在人格与世界观形成的关键窗口期（10-20 岁），为世界预装一代具备系统思维、设计能力与 AI 工具运用能力的系统领导者。
descriptionEn: U20 Summit conducts a capacity building experiment during the critical window (ages 10-20) to equip the next generation with systems thinking, design capabilities, and AI tool proficiency.
shortDesc: 2035 议程：来自 Z 世代的系统提案
shortDescEn: 2035 Agenda: Systems Proposals from Gen Z
venue: 上海香港科技大学大上海中心

title: 中国循环再生 100 计划主题论坛
description: 在全球供应链被欧盟 ESPR、DPP、CBAM 等新规则重构的时代，中国循环再生 100 计划致力于成为中国在全球循环经济与绿色制造领域的系统解决方案输出平台。
descriptionEn: In an era where global supply chains are reshaped by EU ESPR, DPP, and CBAM, China Circularity 100 aims to become a systematic solution export platform for circular economy and green manufacturing.
shortDesc: 数字化 AI+ 材料 + 零碳 + 出海
shortDescEn: Digital AI + Materials + Zero Carbon + Global Expansion

title: 全球可持续贸易系统主题论坛
description: 面对欧盟零毁林法案 (EUDR)、碳边境调节机制 (CBAM) 等全球绿色贸易新规，本次论坛旨在超越传统的合规讨论，将挑战转化为系统性机遇。
descriptionEn: Facing new global green trade regulations like EUDR and CBAM, this forum aims to transcend traditional compliance discussions and transform challenges into systemic opportunities.
partnersEn: China Chamber of Commerce for Import and Export

title: 未来食物主题论坛
description: 本次论坛以亚洲开发银行（ADB）2030 年 400 亿美元投资框架为战略契机，构建一个以未来餐桌为起点的系统性行动枢纽。
descriptionEn: Leveraging ADBs $40 billion investment framework by 2030, this forum builds a systemic action hub starting from Future Table.
shortDesc: 谷雨宣言——从餐桌重塑未来食物系统
shortDescEn: Grain Rain Declaration: Reshaping Future Food from Table
venue: 上海长宁荟聚 D 栋 4 楼多功能厅

title: 亚太水安全与韧性创新年会
titleEn: APAC Water Security & Resilience Innovation Annual Meeting
description: 本届年会旨在打造一个集科技、产业、金融、场景、协作于一体的亚太水安全创新引擎，将中国十五五规划的战略部署与全球水议程深度对接。
descriptionEn: This annual meeting aims to create an APAC water security innovation engine integrating technology, industry, finance, scenarios, and collaboration.
shortDesc: 创新驱动水安全：气候适应、韧性与可持续发展
shortDescEn: Innovation for Water Security: Climate Adaptation, Resilience & Sustainability
venue: 上海伊敦康得思酒店 2F 伊敦厅
address: 宝山区吴淞口路 166 号

title: 旗舰 30 品｜绿色设计论坛
description: 本倡议旨在将绿色设计从理念和边缘实践，提升为驱动全球产业系统性减排的核心杠杆。提出可量化目标：通过设计端创新，撬动每年百亿吨二氧化碳减排潜力。
descriptionEn: This initiative elevates green design from concept to core lever driving systemic emission reduction, targeting 10 gigatons of CO2 reduction potential annually through design innovation.
shortDesc: 年度百亿吨减排倡议行动计划
venue: 同济大学设计创意学院
venueEn: Tongji University College of Design and Innovation

title: CONNECT+ 区域和国际行动协作
description: CONNECT+ 旨在构建一个连接全球气候行动四季（上海、伦敦、曼谷等气候周）与各城市本土创新行动的多层次协作系统。
descriptionEn: CONNECT+ builds a multi-level collaboration system linking global climate action Four Seasons with local city innovations.
shortDescEn: Three Cities Engine, Setting Sail from the East

title: 世界地球日特别活动
description: 本次地球日特别论坛聚焦利用人工智能、绿色科技与数字解决方案，系统性应对海洋与海岛地区面临的独特气候风险。
descriptionEn: This Earth Day special forum focuses on leveraging AI, green technology, and digital solutions to address unique climate risks facing marine and island regions.
shortDesc: 气候技术助力海洋与岛屿地区韧性可持续发展
shortDescEn: Climate Tech for Resilient Marine & Island Development

title: 领导力与董事会气候韧性治理论坛
titleEn: Leadership & Board Climate Resilience Governance Forum
description: 在气候与自然约束成为全球经济基本边界的时代，企业转型的核心瓶颈是领导力与治理能力。本论坛将 LEAD 50 与董事会气候与自然治理深度融合。
descriptionEn: In an era where climate constraints become basic boundaries of global economy, the core bottleneck of corporate transformation is leadership and governance capability.
shortDesc: 领导力：良治转型与协作
venue: 虹桥绿谷 G 栋一楼多功能厅
address: 闵行区虹桥国际商务区甬虹路 69 号

title: 可持续基础设施投融资论坛
description: 本赛道旨在将 Resilience by Design（韧性设计）升级为推动可持续基础设施投融资实践的操作系统。通过 FAST-Infra 与中国十五五规划对标，构建可投资项目资产池。
descriptionEn: This track elevates Resilience by Design to an operating system for sustainable infrastructure financing, aligning FAST-Infra with Chinas 14th Five-Year Plan.
venue: 虹桥绿谷 G 栋七楼

title: 转绿成金可持续金融主题论坛
titleEn: Turning Green to Gold Sustainable Finance Forum
description: 转绿成金联动伦敦、香港、上海、曼谷四大金融中心，为全球资本进入中国绿色转型构建金融新基础设施。
descriptionEn: Turning Green to Gold links four financial hubs (London, HK, Shanghai, Bangkok) to build new financial infrastructure for global capital entering Chinas green transition.
shortDesc: 共筑可持续金融大生态
venue: 虹桥绿谷 G 栋七楼

title: 绿色科技×AI 论坛
description: 本赛道构建需求牵引、专业协同、资本验证的判断装置，提前 5-10 年为产业、资本与政策系统性制造并释放可信的投资方向信号。
descriptionEn: This track builds a demand-driven, professionally coordinated, capital-validated judgment mechanism to generate credible investment direction signals 5-10 years ahead.
shortDesc: 真实需求定义未来十年投资方向标
shortDescEn: Real Needs Define Next Decades Investment Direction
venue: 虹桥绿谷 G 栋一楼多功能厅

title: 绿色供应链新规则论坛
titleEn: Green Supply Chain New Rules Forum
description: 本论坛旨在推动中国专精特新中小企业完成认知与能力跃迁，将 Scope 3（供应链间接排放）从被动合规负担，转化为主动的全球竞争力入口。
descriptionEn: This forum aims to help Chinas Specialized & New SMEs transform Scope 3 from passive compliance burden to active global competitiveness entry point.
shortDesc: 专精特新小巨人迈向绿色巨人
shortDescEn: From Little Giants to Green Giants
venue: 宝武碳中和产业园 南楼 2F 报告厅
venueEn: Baowu Carbon Neutrality Industrial Park, South Building 2F

title: 可持续数据中心论坛
description: 本论坛旨在将数据中心从高能耗挑战重塑为绿色数字未来的核心引擎。联合阿里巴巴等全球产业领袖，共同发布《上海绿色算力倡议》。
descriptionEn: This forum aims to reshape data centers from high energy consumption challenge to core engine of green digital future, releasing Shanghai Green Computing Initiative.
venue: 上海徐汇区滨江西岸传媒港 D 区
venueEn: Shanghai Xuhui West Bund Media Port, Zone D

title: 百品领航 DPP 论坛
description: 百品领航以数字产品护照（DPP）为核心抓手，系统构建中国产品面向全球市场的综合能力体系，打造下一代可持续产品出海操作系统。
descriptionEn: 100 Products Leading uses Digital Product Passport (DPP) as core lever to build Chinese products comprehensive capability system for global markets.
shortDesc: 从可持续产品到 DPP 驱动的产品系统重构
shortDescEn: From Sustainable Products to DPP-Driven Product System

title: 绿色燃料与分子能源论坛
description: 本论坛旨在推动生物质乙醇从传统替代燃料跃迁为支撑未来产业体系的平台型碳分子，在航运、航空、化工三大场景中建立中国全球竞争优势。
descriptionEn: This forum aims to elevate biomass ethanol from traditional alternative fuel to platform carbon molecule supporting future industrial systems.
shortDesc: 生物质乙醇在绿色低碳场景中的创新应用
venue: 宝武（上海）碳中和产业园

title: CCUS 创新与产业链协同论坛
titleEn: CCUS Innovation & Industry Chain Collaboration Forum
description: 本论坛推动 CCUS 从减排工具到价值系统的范式跃迁，聚焦从碳治理到碳生产力，将 CCUS 定位为工业体系重构的基础设施级能力。
descriptionEn: This forum promotes CCUS paradigm shift from emission reduction tool to value system, focusing on transition from carbon governance to carbon productivity.
shortDesc: 技术、产业、标准、投融资协同
venue: 宝武（上海）碳中和产业园
partners: 上海气候周绿色低碳转型合作中心

title: 可持续消费论坛
description: 本次论坛启动可持续消费与设计操作系统，将全球气候治理焦点从企业碳中和下沉至产品可持续性。
descriptionEn: This forum launches Sustainable Consumption & Design Operating System, shifting global climate governance focus from corporate carbon neutrality to product sustainability.
partnersEn: China National Textile and Apparel Council
